name: Dropbox Business
description: Dropbox Business team management. Monitor team members, devices, sharing policies, and audit logs.

checks.name: Employee Access
checks.description: Lists all Dropbox Business team members and verifies their account status and email verification.

checks.name: Device List
checks.description: Lists all devices (web sessions, desktop clients, mobile clients) connected to the Dropbox Business team.

checks.name: App Availability
checks.description: Verifies that the Dropbox Business API is accessible and returns team information.
